privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file contains no metadata field. The task involves using GIMP to create paintbrush strokes on a blank white canvas (800x600px) created during pre_task setup. The verifier (verifier.py::check_paintbrush_drawing) detects brush strokes by analyzing pixel differences between the original and result images using connected component analysis and requires: ≥3 distinct stroke regions, ≥5% canvas coverage, well-distributed strokes, good contrast (avg_contrast > 30), and image modification to pass (score ≥75 out of 100).
